## Checklist

- [ ] Created from a dedicated branch (not committed directly to `master`)
- [ ] `./gradlew assembleDebug` succeeds (app compiles)
- [ ] `./gradlew test` passes (unit tests green)
- [ ] UI changes were checked on an emulator/device or via the PR build APK
- [ ] No secrets, keystores, or `local.properties` committed
